scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run prepare-standalone && electron-builder
scripts.release:win: npx prisma generate && npm run build && npm run prepare-standalone && electron-builder --win nsis --publish never
scripts.package: npm rebuild better-sqlite3 && npm run build && npm run prepare-standalone && npx @electron/rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3 && npx electron-packager . Vault --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist --overwrite --no-asar --win32metadata.CompanyName="stephendotgg" --win32metadata.FileDescription="Vault" --win32metadata.ProductName="Vault"
scripts.install:local: node -e "const cp=require('child_process');for(const proc of ['Vault.exe','electron.exe']){try{cp.execSync('taskkill /F /IM '+proc,{stdio:'ignore'})}catch(e){}}" && node -e "const cp=require('child_process');let ok=false;for(let i=0;i<3;i++){try{cp.execSync('npm rebuild better-sqlite3',{stdio:'inherit'});ok=true;break;}catch(e){if(i<2){cp.execSync('powershell -NoProfile -Command Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 900',{stdio:'ignore'});}}}if(!ok){process.exit(1);}" && npm run build && npm run prepare-standalone && npx @electron/rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3 && npx electron-packager . Vault --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist --overwrite --no-asar --win32metadata.CompanyName="stephendotgg" --win32metadata.FileDescription="Vault" --win32metadata.ProductName="Vault" && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src='dist/Vault-win32-x64';const dest=path.join(process.env.LOCALAPPDATA,'Programs','Vault');fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});console.log('Installed to '+dest)" && npm rebuild better-sqlite3
scripts.add-startup: powershell -Command "$ws = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $s = $ws.CreateShortcut([Environment]::GetFolderPath('Startup') + '\Vault.lnk'); $s.TargetPath = [Environment]::GetFolderPath('LocalApplicationData') + '\Programs\Vault\Vault.exe'; $s.Save(); Write-Host 'Added to Windows startup'"
scripts.remove-startup: powershell -Command "Remove-Item ([Environment]::GetFolderPath('Startup') + '\Vault.lnk') -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Removed from Windows startup'"
